---
title: Session 06 - Preregistration 1
number-sections: false
description: We learn how to preregister a study
---

# Overview

| Topic                                 | Duration | Notes                                                                                                     |
| :------------------------------------ | :------: | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Wrap up homework 1: Literature search |    30    |                                                                                                           |
| Power analysis Intro                  |    60    | [Slides](../slides/Power-Analysis_General_Intro/Power-Analysis-general-intro.qmd)                         |
| Do a power analysis in practice       |    50    |                                                                                                           |
| How (not) to report a power analysis  |    15    | [Slides](../slides/Power-Analysis Reporting/How-to-report-a-power-analysis.qmd)                           |
| Game: Prereg advocatus Diaboli        |    20    | [Slides](../slides/Preregistration - Advocatus Diaboli Game/Preregistration - Advocatus Diaboli Game.qmd) |

: {.striped}
